data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate lifecycle timestamps requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of lifecycle timestamps (open/acknowledged/resolved/waived/dismissed) for breach events. However, the provided evidence does not include any details or data regarding these timestamps, indicating a lack of coverage for this requirement. The absence of this critical information means that the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of lifecycle timestamps for breach events.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify lifecycle timestamps.
